Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, arbitrary(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh") AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__arbitrary" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/37a1ce02ac36c9a93e21c0467da488166acf8df63e6fc2964f767c3b98981ab7/537ddf44-de56-4f17-a3b6-1c9e5f2840bf/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
